creator: support@johncompanies.com
text:
JohnCompanies

JohnCompanies specializes in FreeBSD VPS servers and dedicated/managed FreeBSD colocation. Free, unlimited support comes directly from FreeBSD engineers with NO ticket system, no auto responders and no first level techs reading from cue-cards. Housed in a state of the art, secure facility with multi-homed tier 1 backbone connections.
